eval_feedback.overall: The response passes all 9 assertions. It provides a comprehensive and well-structured guide for running a full E2E Judge visual regression test with S3 upload. It correctly uses --journeys all and --upload-s3, lists all 7 journeys with descriptions and screenshot counts, mentions the /admin/e2e-judge dashboard, uses the correct internal ALB URL, avoids hardcoding credentials, describes the chat journey's pre-send + 30s interval screenshot strategy, and explicitly warns about acquisition_package being the longest journey.
